---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or an improvement to an existing one
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What is currently hard or impossible to do with SMOS? Be specific — the use case matters more than the proposed solution.

## Proposed change

What you would like SMOS to do. If you have more than one idea, open more than one issue.

## Alternatives considered

What you tried before filing this, and why it did not fit.

## Out of scope

Anything you explicitly do NOT want this change to touch. Helps keep the discussion focused.

## Additional context

Links to issues, discussions, or external projects that informed this request.
